name: hpe-san-monorepo
description: Unified HPE SAN Simulator, Discovery, API, and Dashboard

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix chatbot-service && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:simulator" "npm run start:api" "npm run start:chatbot" "npm run start:dashboard"
scripts.start:api: nodemon --watch api --watch discovery --watch simulator --watch .env -e py --exec "python3.11 api/app.py"
